creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried to build the FreeBSD documentation


$ cd doc && make

with an up-to-date hugo package:
hugo v0.133.1+extended freebsd/amd64 BuildDate=2024-08-27T16:17:04Z+0000 VendorInfo=freebsd

I get the warning/error:

WARN  books/handbook/install/_index.adoc: asciidoctor: ERROR: <stdin>: line 149: dropping cells from incomplete row detected end of table
